migrations.description: Creates governance schema, GovernanceEvent table, governance event stored procedures, indexes, append-only trigger, and runtime role protections.
Creates durable ToolRequest table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent.
Creates durable ToolGateDecision table and stored procedures linked to ToolRequest and GovernanceEvent.
Creates durable ApprovalDecision table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent with scoped approval subjects.
Creates durable AcceptedApproval table and stored procedures for append-only accepted approval records.
Creates durable PolicySatisfaction table and stored procedures for append-only policy satisfaction records.
Creates durable PolicyDecisionEvent table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent and optional request, gate, and approval evidence.
Creates durable DogfoodReceipt table and stored procedures linked to GovernanceEvent and optional governance evidence records.
Creates durable ThoughtLedgerGovernanceEventReference table and stored procedures linking ThoughtLedger entry IDs to GovernanceEvent records as evidence only.
Creates durable A2A AgentHandoff tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only governance event linkage.
Creates durable WorkflowRun tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only workflow run storage.
Adds durable WorkflowStep stored procedures, sequence metadata, verifier coverage, and evidence-only workflow step storage over the existing workflow step tables.
Creates durable WorkflowCheckpoint tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and evidence-only checkpoint storage.
Creates durable memory proposal staging tables, stored procedures, append-only triggers, and staging-only authority protections.
Creates durable workflow apply dry-run receipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and receipt-only authority protections.
Creates durable controlled dry-run receipt table, stored procedures, append-only trigger, and evidence-only authority protections.
